raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Anti-Discrimination for Caregivers Act (AB 1119) will prohibit employers from discriminating against employees based on their family responsibilities.",
    "The Chosen Family Act (AB 1041) will expand the definition of 'family member' for purposes of family and sick leave.",
    "The Rental Registry (AB 1188) aims to establish rental registries that will help define the size, scope, and magnitude of California's housing crisis.",
    "The EDD Reform bill (AB 402) will establish the Office of the Claimant Advocate to protect Californians' rights in seeking benefits administered by the EDD.",
    "The Kids Act (AB 1545) will require online platforms targeting children to block manipulative design features and limit harmful content.",
    "The Sexual Assault by Law Enforcement bill (AB 1455) extends the statute of limitations for victims sexually assaulted by law enforcement officers."
  ]
}
```
